requirement_topic.en: GEMS MEPS — Air Conditioners and Air-to-air Heat Pumps up to 65 kW
requirement_topic.zh: GEMS最低能源性能标准——65 kW及以下空调和空气-空气热泵
requirement_topic.zht: GEMS最低能源性能標準——65 kW及以下空調和空氣-空氣熱泵

summary.en: The Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards Act 2012 and the Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards (Air Conditioners up to 65kW) Determination 2019 are the mandatory Australian obligations for covered air-source heat pumps sold or supplied in Australia. Covered models must be registered with the GEMS Regulator and must meet MEPS values for heating and/or cooling. AS/NZS 3823 series methods are referenced by the determination for testing and rating; they support the legal determination but are not the standalone mandatory obligation.
summary.zh: 《2012年温室和能源最低标准法》以及《2019年温室和能源最低标准（65 kW及以下空调）裁定》是覆盖范围内空气源热泵在澳大利亚销售或供应的强制性义务。覆盖型号必须向GEMS监管机构注册，并满足制热和/或制冷MEPS数值。AS/NZS 3823系列方法由该裁定引用，用于测试和评级；其支持法律裁定，但不是独立的强制性义务。
summary.zht: 《2012年溫室和能源最低標準法》以及《2019年溫室和能源最低標準（65 kW及以下空調）裁定》是涵蓋範圍內空氣源熱泵在澳洲銷售或供應的強制性義務。涵蓋型號必須向GEMS監管機構註冊，並滿足制熱和/或制冷MEPS數值。AS/NZS 3823系列方法由該裁定引用，用於測試和評級；其支持法律裁定，但不是獨立的強制性義務。

standards_or_laws: Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards Act 2012
Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards (Air Conditioners up to 65kW) Determination 2019

summary.en: Chinese air-source heat pump and air-conditioner energy files commonly rely on GB/T 7725, GB/T 25127, GB 21455, and China energy label data. Those reports may support engineering review but do not substitute for GEMS registration, Australian MEPS declarations, or testing against the AS/NZS 3823 methods referenced by the Australian determination.
summary.zh: 中国空气源热泵和空调能效文件通常依据GB/T 7725、GB/T 25127、GB 21455和中国能效标识数据。这些报告可支持工程审查，但不能替代GEMS注册、澳大利亚MEPS声明或按澳大利亚裁定引用的AS/NZS 3823方法进行测试。
summary.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵和空調能效文件通常依據GB/T 7725、GB/T 25127、GB 21455和中國能效標識資料。這些報告可支持工程審查，但不能替代GEMS註冊、澳洲MEPS聲明或按澳洲裁定引用的AS/NZS 3823方法進行測試。

gap.en: China energy label or GB/T seasonal performance data must be mapped to the Australian product class, capacity, heating/cooling configuration, and test conditions. Importers generally need Australian GEMS registration and evidence using the determination's referenced methods before sale.
gap.zh: 中国能效标识或GB/T季节性能数据必须映射到澳大利亚产品类别、能力、制热/制冷配置和测试条件。进口商通常需在销售前取得澳大利亚GEMS注册，并提供按裁定引用方法形成的证据。
gap.zht: 中國能效標識或GB/T季節性能資料必須映射到澳洲產品類別、能力、制熱/制冷配置和測試條件。進口商通常需在銷售前取得澳洲GEMS註冊，並提供按裁定引用方法形成的證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: GEMS Act and Air Conditioners up to 65kW Determination; AS/NZS 3823 methods are referenced testing and rating routes within the determination
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China domestic energy efficiency where in scope, but not accepted as Australian GEMS registration

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — covered China models need Australian GEMS registration and MEPS evidence under the Australian determination; Chinese energy reports are not a substitute.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——覆盖范围内的中国型号需要按澳大利亚裁定取得GEMS注册和MEPS证据；中国能效报告不能替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——涵蓋範圍內的中國型號需要按澳洲裁定取得GEMS註冊和MEPS證據；中國能效報告不能替代。
